---
description: This calls bmad-create-epics-and-stories to generate epics and stories based on the current state of the project and the implementation plan generated by bmad.
model: Claude Sonnet 4.6 (copilot)
argument-hint: file=epics-2026-03-31.md
---

load the #skill:prompt
run `bmad-create-epics-and-stories` in a subAgent and use ${file} as the epic descriptions

Once that completes, for each of the stories in the resulting epics file that will have the same file name as the ${file} but will be located in \_bmad-output/planning-artifacts, create the story using the `bmad-create-story` skill and use the story metadata file that is generated by `bmad-create-epics-and-stories` for each story as the input to `bmad-create-story`.

Set the status of all stories created to "Approved"
